actionCalls.description: Assign OBS Owner from the Single Site RR - aka "CombinedPathOBS"
actionCalls.name: Assign_OBS_on_CF_Single_Site_RR
actionCalls.label: Assign OBS on CF - Single Site RR

actionCalls.description: Since all the accounts in the account hierarchy are already activated, RR for a new OBS Owner from the Multi-Site RR Public Group.
actionCalls.name: CORE_Multi_Site_RR_New_OBS
actionCalls.label: CORE Multi-Site RR New OBS

assignments.description: Add single onboarding contact roles to collection
assignments.name: Add_to_collection
assignments.label: Add to collection

assignments.name: Single_Op_contact_role_to_Onboarding_contact_role
assignments.label: Single Op contact role to Onboarding contact role

decisions.description: Checks if the current Combined Funnel owner is active
decisions.name: Active_Assigned_OBS
decisions.label: Active Assigned OBS?

decisions.description: Checks if the current Combined Funnel owner is active
decisions.name: Active_CF_Owner
decisions.label: Active CF Owner?

decisions.description: Checks if the current Combined Funnel owner is active
decisions.name: Active_CF_Owner_2
decisions.label: Active CF Owner?

rules.name: Billing_Status_at_CW_not_null
rules.label: Billing Status at CW not null

decisions.description: Checks the value selected on the Onboarding Path on the opportunity.
decisions.name: Combined_Funnel_Ownership_Path
decisions.label: Combined Funnel Ownership Path

decisions.description: Logic translated into decision nodes to assign ownership of Combined Funnel record as its related onboarding records
decisions.name: Combined_Funnel_Ownership_Path_1
decisions.label: Combined Funnel Ownership Path

rules.name: Alls_Account_in_Hierarchy_Activated_Already
rules.label: Alls Account in Hierarchy Activated Already

decisions.description: Check to see if Saas is Activated or Not
decisions.name: is_Saas_Activated
decisions.label: is Saas Activated?

decisions.description: The account type (government, core, Single Site, or Multi-Site) determines which routers it goes to.
decisions.name: Is_SS_or_Multi_Site_Core_or_GOv
decisions.label: Is SS or Multi Site - Core or Gov

rules.name: Core_Single_Site_RR_SS_ST_DT
rules.label: Core Single Site RR SS/ST DT

decisions.description: Checks the OBS Owner field on the related account is populated.
decisions.name: OBS_Owner_Populated_NoCF
decisions.label: OBS Owner Populated

decisions.description: With Standard onboarding path - if Billing Upsell Opp was CW without the Ratecard or EIN and the customer already has Saas Activated, then a Sales Follow-up is scheduled with the AE so the onboarding is owned by the Standard Onboarding Path Queue instead of OBS.
decisions.name: Opportunity_Sales_Followup_or_Passed_to_OBS_at_CW
decisions.label: Opportunity Sales Followup or Passed to OBS at CW

decisions.description: Checks if the customer is still onboarding on SaaS
decisions.name: Still_Onboarding_on_Saas
decisions.label: Still Onboarding on Saas?

decisions.description: Checks if the customer is still onboarding on SaaS
decisions.name: Still_Onboarding_on_Saas_2
decisions.label: Still Onboarding on Saas?

Flow.description:
When Billing Upsell Opportunity is Closed-Won, flow finds and updates Combined Funnel and Billing Onboarding records OR creates new if none are found. 04/24/2024 - BW - Added update to Account Billing Activation Start Date 08/09/2023 - PE - Updated flow with new logic for combined funnel and onboarding record ownership assignment upon a Billing Upsell opportunity being moved to Closed Won. (Sprint 14 - 2023) 08/25/2023 - PE - Updated flow to include a path for Brand New Program. Also tweaked CF and Onboarding ownership logic. (Sprint 15 - 2023) 09/01 - PE - Updated logic of assignment for the Goverment accounts path. (Sprint 16 - 2023) JH: 9/7/23: updated to have flow null / blank value of Billing Opt Out reason on CF 09/22/23 - PE - Updated group ids from Get Group Members node. (Sprint 17) 10/18/23 - PE - Updated Gov Account routing logic (Sprint 19) 12.22.23 - DJ - Updated to remove field mappings to old Initial Setup Call Scheduled and Onboarding Training Call Scheduled fields on CFs 07/19/24 - PE - Added subflow after billing onboarding records are created. 01/31/2024 - LK - Added logic for the new Standard Onboarding Path. If customer is still onboarding, then the onboarding record should be owned by the same OBS, if not then Standard Onboarding Path Queue if Sales Follow-up Call is populated and not the OBS or OBS Scheduled date. If OBS is populated ( because ratecard = yes and ein= yes at BUP Oppty) then assign to that same OBS. 02/25/25 - PE - Added subflow to create OB Attemps 5/2/25 - JH - Removed update to "Brand New Program" on CF when upsell opp onboarding path is not BNP so it doesnt override this when a billing upsell opp is cw
Flow Diagram: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1v6m9G-S9hcrFXjT9yuKSt76PhN_Bn05T/view?usp=sharing 05/22/2025 - AC - Removed references to Onboarding - Subflow - Sync With School Object flow. 07/18/2025 - AC - Updated to not Overwrite the Billing Status at CW if it's already populated. 09/25/2025 - BW - Update to bring in School Object data to calculate if Billing Winback Date is needed 09/25/2025 - Update OBS owner Logic for standard and Site Add Non DT - combined funnel owner 10/14/2025 - LK - Adding Site-Add Non-DT and updating self-serve path

formulas.name: CFOwnerFromAccount

formulas.description: Returns true if the combined length of the Account Name and " - Billing Onboarding" is 80 characters or more.
formulas.name: CheckOnboardingNameLength
forBillingWinbackDate

formulas.description: Number of days a customer is activated on SaaS
formulas.name: forN_DaysActivatedOnSaaS

formulas.description: Checks if the user assigned as the OBS Owner on the account is active. If not, assigns it to Account Queue.
formulas.name: forT_OBSOwnerExistingCF

formulas.description: Checks if the user assigned as the OBS Owner on the opportunity is active. If not, assigns it to the Account Queue user.
formulas.name: forT_OBSOwnerNoCF
Op_contact_role_to_junction_role
formulas.expression: CASE({!CreatejunctionobjectforeachOpcontact.Role}, 'Decision Maker', 'a1E1I000004OZiO', 'Implementer', 'a1E1I000004OZiT', 'Champion', 'a1E1I000004OZiY', 'Billing Expert', 'a1E1I000004OZid', 'Influencer', 'a1E3u000002UMZv', 'Site Supervisor', 'a1E3u000002UPJ3', 'Billing End User - Admin', 'a1E3u000003RBkM', 'Billing End User - Accountant', 'a1E3u000003RBkR', NULL)

formulas.description: Returns true if the value on the Related Payer Account field on the account contains the word "Iowa" on the name
formulas.name: RelatedPayerIowa

Flow.interviewLabel: CF - Billing Upsell Opp CW - Combined Funnel and Onboarding Create or Update {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: CF - Billing Upsell Opp CW - Combined Funnel and Onboarding Create or Update

loops.description: Create junction object 'onboarding contact' for each contact role on Op
loops.name: CreatejunctionobjectforeachOpcontact
loops.label: Create junction object for each Op contact

recordCreates.name: Create_Billing_Onboarding_From_Existing_CF
recordCreates.label: Create Billing Onboarding From Existing CF

recordCreates.name: Create_Billing_Onboarding_From_New_CF
recordCreates.label: Create Billing Onboarding From New CF

recordCreates.description: Create a new on boarding contacts junction record
recordCreates.name: New_onboarding_junction_record_s
recordCreates.label: New onboarding junction record/s

recordLookups.description: Billing onboarding from Combined Funnel record
recordLookups.name: Billing_Onboarding
recordLookups.label: Billing Onboarding

recordLookups.description: Checks if CF Owner is Active
recordLookups.name: Get_CF_Owner
recordLookups.label: Get CF Owner

recordLookups.description: Pulls the record id of the users that are a member of either SS or MS groups. This will be helpful later to identify if a record is assigned to a user that is part of one of these groups.
recordLookups.name: Get_Group_Members
recordLookups.label: Get Group Members

recordLookups.description: Gets the id of the new combined funnel
recordLookups.name: Get_New_Combined_Funnel_Owner
recordLookups.label: Get New Combined Funnel Owner

recordUpdates.name: Assign_Ownership_to_Self_Serve_Onboarding_Queue
recordUpdates.label: Assign Ownership to Self Serve Onboarding Queue

recordUpdates.description: Deletes any value from the field Billing Onboarding Start Date on the account
recordUpdates.name: Delete_Billing_Onboarding_Start_Date
recordUpdates.label: Delete Billing Onboarding Start Date

recordUpdates.name: Update_Account_Billing_Activation_Start_Date
recordUpdates.label: Update Account Billing Activation Start Date

recordUpdates.description: On Billing Upsell, the OBS owner is required at CW. The that new OBS to update the ownership to the Combined Funnel Record.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Combined_Funnel_with_OBS_from_Oppty
recordUpdates.label: Update Combined Funnel with OBS from Oppty

textTemplates.description: Message to be sent via Slack if the account name exceeds the character limit.
textTemplates.name: SlackMessage
textTemplates.text: Hi there! 😊 It looks like you just tried to mark the Billing Upsell opportunity "{!Opportunity.Name}" as 'Close Won,' but ran into an error message. This happened because the account name "{!Opportunity.Account.Name}" is too lengthy. Could you please take a moment to review and trim it down to 55 characters or less? Then, please give it another try. If you have any questions or need help, the SysOps team is here for you. Thank you!

textTemplates.description: Stores the error message to be used when the Account name and suffix exceed the allowable character limit in Salesforce.
textTemplates.name: templateSlackFaultError
textTemplates.text:
Hey there, {!$User.FirstName} :wave:! It seems like there was a hiccup when you tried to close won the opportunity {!Opportunity.Name} :money_with_wings:. This might be because the account name ({!Opportunity.Account.Name}) combined with ' - Billing Onboarding' is a bit too long :straight_ruler:. Salesforce can only handle up to 80 characters for this :information_desk_person:. Could you maybe give the account name a little trim to make room? :scissors:


If that doesn't seem to be the issue, no worries! :raised_hands: Just create a Zendesk ticket :ticket: and our team will be on it in right away! :zap

variables.description: Collection of onboarding contact roles to create
variables.name: Onboarding_contacts_collection
